/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compressor_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcompressor_plugin.so -o libcompressor_plugin.so CMakeFiles/compressor_plugin.dir/compressor_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compressor_plugin.dir/compressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/compressor_plugin.dir/compressor_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
